overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a rain-soaked downtown sidewalk at night. Neon billboards and streetlights illuminate the wet streets as traffic passes by, with a distinctive red-lit skyscraper visible in the distance against the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside tall hedge wall approaching downtown intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to a tall hedge wall with neon billboards visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall dark hedge wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
palm trees visible above the hedge against the night sky
large illuminated billboards with colorful advertisements across the multi-lane street
distinctive skyscraper with red vertical lighting visible in the downtown skyline
rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a tall hedge wall on the left, with a busy multi-lane street to the right. Neon billboards and a distinctive red-lit skyscraper are visible in the distance through the heavy rain, while occasional vehicles pass by on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with illuminated billboards and passing traffic

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky above the downtown buildings
exiting the hedge-lined section, entering area with building facades on the left
black SUV drives past on the wet street, splashing through puddles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to a busy intersection with prominent neon billboards and increased traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the wet road, headlights reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement

entered.detail: light-colored commercial building facade replacing the hedge wall on the left

segments.scene_description: A lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky as the character passes the hedge-lined section and enters a more open intersection area. The sidewalk now runs alongside a building facade while traffic increases on the right, with vehicles splashing through the rain-soaked streets beneath glowing neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with commercial buildings and distant illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the building-lined sidewalk with the red skyscraper now visible to the left

entered.detail: tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk from the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the urban sidewalk with a building wall on the left and the street on the right. The billboard cluster and distinctive red skyscraper recede into the distance as the rain continues to fall, creating reflective pools on the concrete surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked downtown sidewalk that shifts from a secluded, hedge-lined path to a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with the character walking beside a tall hedge wall and a busy multi-lane street, with a distinctive red-lit skyscraper looming through the heavy rain in the distance. As a flash of lightning illuminates the stormy sky, the camera moves past the greenery and opens into a bustling intersection where the sidewalk runs alongside a building facade and vehicles splash through deep puddles. The scene then continues along the urban corridor, with the glowing billboard cluster and red skyscraper gradually receding into the distance. Finally, the camera tracks the character past reflective pools of water on the concrete as the city lights blur into the persistent rainfall.
